usage: editPowerVia [-help] [-area <{x1 y1 x2 y2} {x3 y3 x4 y4} ...>] [-bottom_layer <layername>] [-cell_pins <string>] [-create_via_on_merged_target_on_layer <string>] [-create_via_on_merged_target_within <float>] [-create_via_on_signal_pins <0|1>] [-exclude_stack_vias <0|1>] [-followpin_via_stapling {cutclass1 weight1 cutclass2 weight2}] [-nets <string>] [-orthogonal_only <0|1>] [-same_sized_stack_vias <0|1>] [-skip_via_on_pin [pad block cover standardcell physicalpin]] [-skip_via_on_wire_shape [blockring stripe followpin corewire blockwire iowire padring ring fillwire noshape]] [-skip_via_on_wire_status [routed fixed cover shield]] [-split_long_via {threshold step offset length}] [-split_vias <0|1>] [-top_layer <layername>] [-uda <subclass_string>] [-via_using_exact_crossover_size <0|1>] [-add_vias <0|1> | -delete_vias <0|1> | -modify_vias <0|1> ] [-between_selected_wires <0|1> | -selected_blocks <0|1> | -selected_wires <0|1> | -selected_vias <0|1>] [[[-via_columns <integer>] [-via_rows <integer>]] | [[-via_height <float>] [-via_width <float>]] | [[-via_scale_height <float>] [-via_scale_width <float>]]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -add_vias
options.description: Specifies to add vias

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies to drop vias within areas

options.name: -between_selected_wires
options.description: Specifies to drop vias between selected wires

options.name: -bottom_layer
options.description: Specifies the bottom-most metal layer

options.name: -cell_pins
options.description: Specifies PG terminals or pins to drop vias on

options.name: -create_via_on_merged_target_on_layer
options.description: <string> Drops vias on merged targets instead of original ones

options.name: -create_via_on_merged_target_within
options.description: <float> Merges the targets within the specified distance on the specified layer

options.name: -create_via_on_signal_pins
options.description: Specifies to create vias on signal pins

options.name: -delete_vias
options.description: Specifies to delete vias

options.name: -exclude_stack_vias
options.description: Specifies to generate stack vias

options.name: -followpin_via_stapling
options.description: {cutclass1 weight1 cutclass2 weight2} Defines two cut classes to be tried in priority in followpin via stapling, weight value is for via insertion ratio calculation

options.name: -modify_vias
options.description: Specifies to modify vias

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies the nets to drop vias on

options.name: -orthogonal_only
options.description: Creates vias only on intersections of orthogonal wires and pins

options.name: -same_sized_stack_vias
options.description: Generates same-sized stacked vias

options.name: -selected_blocks
options.description: Specifies to drop vias on selected blocks

options.name: -selected_vias
options.description: Specifies to modify selected vias

options.name: -selected_wires
options.description: Specifies to drop vias on selected wires

options.name: -skip_via_on_pin
options.description: [pad block cover standardcell physicalpin] Skips via creation on pin of specified type

options.name: -skip_via_on_wire_shape
options.description: [blockring stripe followpin corewire blockwire iowire padring ring fillwire noshape] Skips via creation on wire of specified shape

options.name: -skip_via_on_wire_status
options.description: [routed fixed cover shield] Skips via creation on wire of specified status

options.name: -split_long_via
options.description: {threshold step offset length} Split vias longer than <threshold> into smaller vias with specified <step> and bottom/left end <offset> and vertical/horizontal <length>

options.name: -split_vias
options.description: Specifies whether to split vias when obs intervenes

options.name: -top_layer
options.description: Specifies the top-most metal layer

options.name: -uda
options.description: Attaches to via the user defined attribute subclass

options.name: -via_columns
options.description: Specifies the number of cuts to make in the vias

options.name: -via_height
options.description: Specifies via height

options.name: -via_rows
options.description: Specifies the number of cuts to make in the vias

options.name: -via_scale_height
options.description: Specifies the percentage to scale on via height

options.name: -via_scale_width
options.description: Specifies the percentage to scale on via width

options.name: -via_using_exact_crossover_size
options.description: Specifies to generate partial vias from the exact crossover size

options.name: -via_width
options.description: Specifies via width
